# The Patrick Group | Southeast Michigan Real Estate

> Boutique real estate team serving all of Southeast Michigan (Oakland, Macomb, Wayne, and surrounding counties), led by Sarah Patrick, Principal Broker, licensed since 2000, with Brad Patrick, Realtor. Office: 408 East Street, Rochester, MI 48307. Phone: 248-755-3545. Part of Oak & Stone Real Estate. 5.0 rating across 32 Google reviews.

Key facts: local MLS-sourced market data updated nightly, monthly market reports from Realcomp data, and city guides for 24 Southeast Michigan communities. Market statistics on this site come from live MLS data (MichRIC, RealComp, MiRealSource), not third-party estimates.

## Market Data

- [Market Tracker](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/market-tracker): Nightly-updated inventory counts and median prices by city
- [Market Reports](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/market-updates): Monthly Southeast Michigan market reports with Realcomp sales data
- [City vs City Comparisons](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/compare): 17 head-to-head city comparisons with prices, taxes, and commute data

## City Guides

- [Neighborhood Guides](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/neighborhoods): 24 city guides covering Oakland, Macomb, and Wayne counties with median prices, days on market, price per square foot, and school district facts

## Services

- [Buying](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/buying): Buyer representation across Southeast Michigan
- [Selling](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/selling): Listing services and pricing strategy
- [Cash Offer Program](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/cash-offer): Cash offers compared honestly against listing, with typical net proceeds math
- [Homebuyer Grants](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/grants): Free interactive qualification tool. A buyer enters county, income, household size, and buyer status and instantly sees which of 20+ Michigan down payment assistance programs (state, county, city, federal, bank, credit union) they likely qualify for. Program list updated monthly with links to official sources. No comparable tool exists for Michigan.
- [Divorce Real Estate](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/divorce-real-estate): Neutral third-party home sales during divorce
- [Inherited Property](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/inherited-property): Probate and inherited home guidance for Michigan heirs
- [Estate Sales](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/estate-sales): Estate and probate sale process
- [New Construction](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/new-construction): Builder representation
- [Relocation](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/relocation): Moving to Michigan guidance
- [Downsizing](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/downsizing): Downsizing and senior moves

## About

- [Our Team](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/about): Sarah Patrick (Principal Broker), Brad Patrick (Realtor), Christian Brown (Realtor)
- [Client Reviews](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/reviews): Verified Google reviews
- [The Journal](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/insights): Weekly articles on Southeast Michigan real estate trends
- [FAQ](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/faq): Common buyer and seller questions
- [Contact](https://www.thepatrickgrp.com/contact)
